    software

    Lemur
    A prototype verifier that combines LLMs with off-the-shelf program verification tools

    Marabou
    An open-source SMT-based tool that can answer verification queries over neural networks, which I serve as the technical lead

    VeriX
    A toolkit for extracting formal explanations for DNN inferences

    teaching

    CS243 Program Analysis and Optimizations
    Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Prof. Monica Lam)
    Winter 2020, Stanford University

    CS357 Formal Methods for Computer Systems
    Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Prof. Caroline Trippel)
    Fall 2021, Stanford University

    Co-instructor with Prof. Caroline Trippel
    Fall 2023, Fall 2022, Stanford University
